# McpClient.CancelTaskAsync method

Requests cancellation of a task (spec §25.9).

```csharp
public Task<JsonObject> CancelTaskAsync(string taskId)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| taskId | The task id. |

## Return Value

The empty acknowledgement (`resultType: "complete"`); observe the new state via [`GetTaskAsync`](./GetTaskAsync.md) (§25.9).
